title: Best "Wand of Gamelon" dubs ever!
description:
Me and Pyrstoyska re-dubbed the Zelda - Wand of Gamelon intro. We voiced-acted the intro backwards and then reversed it and (tried) to lip-sync the audio.

Roles:
Laretski - The King, Link
Pyrstoyska - Zelda, Impa

See also the "Faces of Evil" - dub my me and Pyrstoyska, done with the same method:
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3j875K_BZKo
source_pages: YTP da internet\42675349_Best _Wand of Gamelon_ dubs ever!.html
